scan temporary copy for internal paths and secret-like strings

boundary: This dry run is local publication rehearsal only. It copies the reviewed public candidate to an isolated temporary staging folder outside the private workspace and runs git init/add/commit/status without creating a remote, pushing commits, publishing files, writing approved URLs, uploading video, updating Devpost, or submitting anything.
